madara.name: Uchiha Madara
madara.heroType: Hyper Carry Fixed DMG Dealer Mage
strengths: Reliable pressure through Technique and Susanoo
Can survive burst through shield, healing, invincibility and revive
weaknesses: Less explosive in very early fights than pure frontloaded units
Depends on build and stack flow to reach full value
madara.summary: Hybrid carry with strong scaling, mixed normal and fixed damage, and unusually high survivability for a DPS.

saitama.name: Saitama
strengths: Can stabilize teams and absorb pressure extremely well
weaknesses: Damage is more situational than dedicated carries
Needs proper build direction to maximize value

favoredAgainst: teams that rely on early kill pressure
strugglesAgainst: long attrition against stronger scaling defensive cores

saitama.summary: All-in-one frontline anchor with elite sustain, control, support value and strong anti-burst presence.

lux.name: Lux
strengths: Absorbs and redirects massive incoming damage through Full Power
High healing and defensive team value
weaknesses: More vulnerable into damage types that bypass normal defensive patterns
Needs proper frontline/support setup to reach full value
lux.summary: Defensive core support that excels at damage soaking, healing, anti-burst play and long-fight control.
